title: papaver macounii subsp. macounii
intro: Papaver macounii subsp. macounii, also known as Macoun's poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family that is native to North America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects due to the presence of alkaloids like isoquinoline and benzylisoquinoline. The health benefits of Papaver macounii subsp. macounii include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential benefits for respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although its use should be supervised by a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
